title: Auto Tool Mod
description: Automatically switches your held tool to the most efficient one for the block you're mining. Simple, fast, and toggleable.
body:
## ⚡ What does it do? AutoToolMod automatically selects the most efficient tool from your hotbar for the block you are currently mining. No more manual switching — just mine and let the mod handle the rest. ---
* **Instantly detects** the block type. * **Automatically switches** to the correct tool: * ⛏ **Pickaxe** * 🪓 **Axe** * 🥄 **Shovel** * If no suitable tool is found → nothing happens. ---
Press **Right Shift** to enable or disable the mod. Status messages appear above your action bar.

Some servers may not allow this modification. Use it at your own risk.

---
* Requires **Fabric API**
